categories.description: CoD-style custom maps and Fortnite-inspired battle zones rebuilt as navigable WebXR environments. BSP geometry, tactical spawn systems, open-world POIs — all explorable in 6DoF from any browser.

customMapSystem.vrAdaptation: BSP geometry exported to GLTF/GLB via C2M pipeline. Spawn points mapped to VR teleport anchors. IWD textures re-encoded as WebP for WebXR. FastFile bundles replaced by MAL-PROPS-WAREHOUSE geoassets.
customMapSystem.fortniteIntegration: Open-world POI islands on PHI lattice grid. Build mechanics via spatial hand-tracking. Storm circle as 72Hz frequency field contraction from outer bosonic ring inward.

experiences.description: Decimated metropolitan combat zone. BSP-compiled cityscape geometry across 6 urban districts. Tactical spawn navigation and rooftop engagement lanes.
experiences.shortDesc: Urban warfare in full 6DoF VR. Spawn. Navigate. Survive.

experiences.description: 2km-squared open-world battle island with 20 named POIs. Desert, forest, arctic and urban biomes. Fortnite-inspired. Storm circle contracts at 72Hz lattice pulse.
experiences.shortDesc: 100-zone open world. Land anywhere. Fight everywhere.

experiences.description: Iconic compact map. Shipping containers, catwalks, 360-degree engagement. BSP geometry from Radiant. 6 spawn nodes, 5-second max engagement range.
experiences.shortDesc: 24/7 classic. 5-second engagement range. Always intense.

experiences.description: CoD4 Middle East urban environment remastered for VR. Alleyways, rooftop sniping positions, open courtyard. Full d3dbsp BSP geometry converted to GLTF.
experiences.shortDesc: CoD4 Backlot. Rooftops. Alleys. VR remaster.

experiences.description: Tilted Towers arena with hand-tracking build mechanics. Place walls, ramps, and floors in VR via spatial gesture. PHI lattice grid enforces optimal build angles.
experiences.shortDesc: Build + battle in VR. Hand-tracking construction.

experiences.description: Full 100-zone arena mapped to the 48-node Merkaba lattice. Each node is a named drop zone. Storm circle contracts from the bosonic ring inward to the foundation 8 — the final safe zone.
experiences.shortDesc: 100 zones. PHI lattice map. Last 8 standing wins.

categories.description: GTA-style open-world city exploration, procedural urban generation, and free-roam sandbox environments rendered in full 6DoF VR.

experiences.title: Liberty City · Open World VR Tour
experiences.description: GTA-inspired Liberty City built from real New York OSM geometry. 6 boroughs, 400 city blocks, procedural traffic and pedestrian AI. Navigate by foot or vehicle across the full metropolitan grid.

experiences.title: Los Santos · Aerial & Ground Exploration
experiences.description: Los Angeles mapped to GTA proportions. Aerial helicopter view transitions to street-level exploration across Vinewood, the Port, and the surrounding desert. Real USGS terrain heightmap for the hills.

experiences.title: Night City · Neon Metropolis 2077
experiences.description: Cyberpunk-aesthetic megacity at night. Neon rain, holographic billboards, corporate towers rising into smog. A-Frame procedural generation with 528 Hz ACTION pulse driving ambient lighting.

experiences.title: Countryside · Physics Road Trip
experiences.description: Rolling countryside open world — fields, rivers, forests, farm towns. Physics-based vehicle traversal. Freesound CC0 ambient audio for birdsong, wind, engine rumble. Poly Haven textures.

categories.description: Photorealistic real-world locations rendered from satellite imagery, elevation data, and street-level photogrammetry. Any coordinate on Earth, at any altitude.

experiences.title: Google Earth · Any GPS Coordinate
experiences.description: Enter any latitude/longitude and drop into 360° satellite view at that location. Zoom from orbit to street level. Uses Google Maps Static API + elevation API for realistic perspective. 417 Hz LOCATION anchor.

experiences.title: Everest Summit · 8848m Above Sea Level
experiences.description: Stand on top of the world. Photorealistic Everest summit from satellite + photogrammetry. USGS 30m DEM terrain for the massif. Freesound wind and altitude audio. NASA Landsat true-color drape.

experiences.title: Amazon Canopy · Rainforest Flythrough
experiences.description: Aerial flythrough of the Amazon basin canopy — 55M km² of rainforest rendered from ESA Sentinel-2 10m imagery. Freesound tropical ambient audio. River network from OSM hydrography data.

experiences.title: Great Barrier Reef · Coral & Deep Blue
experiences.description: Surface-to-seafloor experience at the Great Barrier Reef. Satellite imagery from above transitions to procedural coral reef with Freesound underwater ambient. 2300km of reef geography from GBRMPA data.

experiences.title: Iceland Volcano · Fagradalsfjall
experiences.description: Active volcanic landscape of Iceland's Fagradalsfjall. Sentinel-2 thermal infrared + true color satellite imagery. Lava field geometry from DEM. Freesound seismic rumble and wind audio.

categories.description: Relive historic and current space missions using NASA public domain imagery, SpaceX CC0 media, and procedural solar system geometry. All assets free.

experiences.title: Falcon 9 · Launch Sequence + Booster Landing
experiences.description: Full Falcon 9 mission from launch pad T-5 minutes through MECO, payload deploy, and autonomous drone-ship booster landing. SpaceX Flickr CC0 imagery. Sound design from NASA rocket audio archive.

experiences.title: ISS Spacewalk · NASA EVA
experiences.description: Outside the International Space Station 408km above Earth. Complete EVA in 6DoF — handrails, solar array geometry, Earth below. NASA 3D ISS model (OBJ/GLB). 852 Hz PHYSICS resonance.

experiences.title: Mars Surface · Perseverance Rover
experiences.description: Walk the surface of Mars with Perseverance. Real NASA Mars mission imagery (public domain) draped on USGS Mars DEM terrain. Jezero Crater geology. Perseverance rover 3D model from NASA public resources.

experiences.title: Hubble Deep Field · 13 Billion Years Back
experiences.description: Stand inside the Hubble Ultra Deep Field — 10,000 galaxies in 2.6 arcminutes of sky. Hubble imagery mapped to an immersive 360° sphere. Each visible smudge is a galaxy of 100 billion stars. NARRATIVE 963 Hz.

experiences.title: Artemis · Lunar Surface Return
experiences.description: Walk the Moon's south pole with Artemis mission trajectory. NASA LRO (Lunar Reconnaissance Orbiter) DEM terrain — the most detailed lunar map ever made. Apollo 17 imagery for context. Shadow regions of permanent darkness.

experiences.title: James Webb · Pillars of Creation 4K
experiences.description: Inside the James Webb Space Telescope's first release images — Pillars of Creation, Carina Nebula, Stephan's Quintet. JWST NASA public domain imagery mapped to 360° spheres. Unprecedented resolution at any zoom.

categories.description: Explore the human body from cellular to organ scale. Medical VR using NIH 3D Print Exchange CC0 models, Open Anatomy Project, and real radiology data. Education and clinical training.

experiences.title: Human Anatomy · Full Body Atlas
experiences.description: Complete human body explorer — navigate 11 organ systems from skeletal to nervous to cardiovascular. NIH 3D Print Exchange CC0 models and Open Anatomy Project Harvard GLTF atlas. Select any structure for AI-narrated explanation.

experiences.title: Brain Connectome · Neural Pathway Tour
experiences.description: Inside the human connectome — 86 billion neurons rendered at cellular scale. Navigate from the cortex through limbic system, cerebellum, brainstem. Allen Brain Atlas connectivity data. 396 Hz ENTITY resonance.

experiences.title: Cardiac Surgery · OR Walkthrough
experiences.description: Step inside a cardiac surgery suite. Human heart anatomy from NIH 3D — four chambers, valves, coronary arteries. Observe CABG procedure step-by-step with AI narrator guide at each surgical landmark.

experiences.title: DNA · Double Helix at 1nm Scale
experiences.description: Shrink to 1 nanometre and explore the DNA double helix. A-T, C-G base pair interactions. Transcription and translation animations. Procedural generation from NCBI sequence data. 396 Hz ENTITY at atomic scale.

categories.description: Architecture, industrial design, and structural engineering in VR. Real Sketchfab CC0 models, GrabCAD community, and NASA spacecraft geometry. For designers, engineers, and the intellectually curious.

experiences.title: Mars Habitat · SpaceX Architecture
experiences.description: Walk through proposed Mars habitat architecture — inflatable modules, regolith shielding, hydroponic bays, life support corridors. SpaceX/NASA concept geometry from public domain renders. 852 Hz PHYSICS structural resonance.

experiences.title: Sagrada Família · Gaudí Parametric
experiences.description: Gaudí's masterwork rendered in full VR at 1:1 scale. Sketchfab CC0 model of the completed Sagrada Família. Hyperbolic paraboloid surfaces, organic stone columns, stained glass light simulation at 852 Hz.

experiences.title: Formula 1 · Pit Lane Engineering
experiences.description: Step into a Formula 1 pit lane. GrabCAD racing car component models. Tire compound physics, suspension geometry, aerodynamic flow visualization via particle systems. Carbon fibre monocoque structural view.

experiences.title: Bridge Structural · BIM Analysis
experiences.description: Step inside the structural engineering of iconic bridges — Golden Gate suspension, Millau Viaduct cable-stay, Roman Pont du Gard arch. BIM model walkthrough with live stress visualization. IFC → GLTF render.

categories.tagline: Feel it before you ride it
categories.productionPhilosophy: A VRuX experience is complete when it is remarkable — not when a timer says stop. Production timelines can span days, weeks, months, or longer. No time ceiling. No compromise. Human consumable first, always.
categories.description: The flagship VRuX Production Directive. Photorealistic, physics-accurate roller coasters across every environment — deep space, ocean abysses, mountain peaks, neon megacities, ancient ruins, zero gravity. Each track is engineered with real G-force physics simulation, spatial wind audio, binaural sound design, and full environment narratives. Sessions range from 10-minute blitzes to multi-hour thrill worlds. You don't watch. You ride.

experiences.name: Cosmic Coaster
experiences.productionTimeline: 4 months (Hubble Deep Field coordinate mapping + G-force physics)
experiences.description: Board the Merkaba Express and launch through active nebulae, asteroid corridors, and the photon rings of dying stars. Track geometry calculated from actual Hubble Deep Field coordinates mapped to PHI-lattice curves. G-force physics, 741 Hz EMOTION resonance, spatial wind audio. Ride options: 15 min loop, 45 min grand tour, or the 3-hour cosmic marathon — all photorealistic, all live.

experiences.name: Mountain Fury
experiences.description: Peak-to-peak suspended coaster threading through photorealistic Himalayan terrain at 8,500m. Wind roar, ice spray particles, vertical drop sequences past cascading glaciers. Terrain geometry from USGS elevation models at 10m resolution. 741 Hz EMOTION resonance. Sessions: 20 min classic, 45 min extended traverse, or the full 2-hour ridge-to-ridge epic. Physically accurate altitude — the air thins as you ascend.

experiences.name: Ocean Plunge
experiences.productionTimeline: 6 months (NOAA bathymetry + pressure physics + bioluminescence rendering)
experiences.description: Drop through open ocean surface then spiral down through bioluminescent zones, coral cathedral arches, and hadal trenches at 11,000m depth. Track physics simulate real hydrodynamic pressure — you feel the crush of depth through haptic cues and visual compression. Sound design: whale song, sonar pings, the groaning of the deep. NOAA ocean floor bathymetry data. Sessions from 20 min to the full 90-min abyss descent.

experiences.name: Neon Grid Rush
experiences.estimatedDuration: 10 min blitz · 30 min city tour · 1-hour ultrarun
experiences.description: Street-level racing coaster weaving through a procedurally generated cyberpunk megacity at night. Neon signs, flying vehicles, holographic billboards, and razor-tight canyon alley sequences at 320 km/h. Simulation Theory lattice geometry — the city IS the computational substrate. Inspired by Blade Runner aesthetics and the GeoQode grid. Sessions: 10 min blitz, 30 min city tour, 1-hour deep-grid ultrarun.

experiences.name: Merkaba Spiral
experiences.description: Navigate the 48-node Merkaba lattice at PHI-tuned velocities (1.618x standard gravity). The track IS the canonical GeoQode dimensional map — you ride through the architecture of the AIOS OS itself. Every node emits its semantic frequency as spatial audio. 72 Hz base frequency pulses through the structure. Sessions: 15 min initiation, 45 min full D48 traverse, or the complete 4-hour 480-node harmonic circuit that maps every dimension of the lattice.

experiences.name: Volcano Fury
experiences.productionTimeline: 6 months (USGS Hawaiian Volcano Observatory geological data + fluid lava simulation)
experiences.description: Launch from the rim of Kīlauea into a 1,200°C lava field corridor, threading through pyroclastic flow channels and magma tube caverns. Geological geometry from USGS Hawaiian Volcano Observatory open data. Heat distortion rendering, ember particle physics, infrasound rumble. A production that requires real geophysics — 6 months minimum. Coming 2026-Q3.

experiences.name: Pharaoh Speed Rail
experiences.estimatedDuration: 30 min grand circuit · 75 min full Giza-Saqqara-Karnak run
experiences.productionTimeline: 9 months (Giza Plateau 3D model + archaeological consultant review)
experiences.description: Race through the interior passages of Giza, Saqqara, and Karnak at speeds Egyptian architects never imagined. Granite corridors, royal burial chambers, hieroglyph light shows, and the King's Chamber resonance at 528 Hz. Archaeological geometry from Giza Plateau 3D open data. An AI narrator traces historical context as you fly through millennia. 9 months of production — because accuracy is everything.

experiences.name: Zero-G Express
experiences.estimatedDuration: 20 min orbit · 90 min full ISS circuit
experiences.productionTimeline: 8 months (NASA ISS 3D geometry + micro-gravity physics + astronaut voice sessions)
experiences.description: A roller coaster that redefines the genre: in zero gravity, what is up or down? The track wraps around the ISS exterior, plunges through docking bays, spirals past solar arrays, and launches you into open spacewalk territory with Earth rotating below. NASA ISS 3D geometry from public domain. Real astronaut voice narration. Micro-gravity physics that make every stomach drop genuinely weightless. 8 months of production — nothing like it exists.

categories.tagline: Infinite cosmologies. Zero human authoring. Lattice-anchored.
categories.description: Worlds born from AIOS Intelligent Lattice — not human-authored. Infinite universe cosmology, multiverse topologies, gameplay with real physics, and research-grade dimensional environments. The AI-Generated axis of VR, distinct from human-reality categories.

experiences.description: An infinite procedural universe generated by AIOS lattice constants. PHI-spiral galaxy arms, dark matter filaments, cosmological constants derived from GeoQode 8→26→48:480. Every direction expands forever.
experiences.shortDesc: Infinite procedural universe. PHI-spiral galaxies. No edge.

experiences.description: Navigate branching multiverse topologies. Each branch is a distinct harmonic node in the 480-spectrum. PHI/PSI geometric bridges between realities. AIOS lattice determines which branches are coherent.
experiences.shortDesc: Navigate the multiverse. PHI bridges between realities.

experiences.description: Research-grade physics simulation anchored to the Merkaba 8→26→48:480 lattice. Real cosmological constants, quantum foam, spacetime curvature. AIOS derives every parameter from GeoQode geometry.
experiences.shortDesc: Real physics. Derived from GeoQode lattice geometry.

experiences.description: Interior spaces of AI-imagined spacecraft. Real spacecraft design principles fused with imaginary vessel architectures. Crew quarters, engine rooms, bridge stations — all generated by AIOS with no human designer.
experiences.shortDesc: AI-designed spacecraft interiors. No human blueprint.

experiences.description: Descend to the Planck scale. Quantum foam, virtual particle pairs, spacetime bubbles at 10^-35m. AIOS renders the sub-atomic as navigable VR space using lattice coherence at 852 Hz PHYSICS resonance.
experiences.shortDesc: VR at Planck scale. Quantum foam you can walk through.

experiences.description: 95% of the universe is invisible — dark matter and dark energy — rendered visible by AIOS inference from gravitational lensing and lattice coherence data. The unseen universe, made navigable.
experiences.shortDesc: Dark matter made visible. Navigate the invisible universe.

experiences.description: Worlds with no real-world analogue. Pure AI imagination — bioluminescent crystal forests, impossible geometries, living architecture. No human designer. AIOS invents the physics, the biome, and the light.
experiences.shortDesc: Pure AI imagination. Worlds no human designed.

revenueModel.freemium: All live experiences free on Meta Quest Browser
revenueModel.premium: Pay-per-XP or monthly pass for extended experiences
revenueModel.enterprise: B2B licensing for corporate VR environments
revenueModel.developer: Revenue share on third-party experience sales

vruxDirective.name: VRuX
vruxDirective.subtitle: VR User eXperience — Production Directive
vruxDirective.philosophy: VRuX is not UIuX. A VRuX experience is Human Consumable — designed for real humans in real time. Remarkable is the only acceptable standard. Production timelines have no upper ceiling: experiences may take days, weeks, months, or years to produce. When it is ready, it is ready. Every VRuX experience must be felt — not observed.

meta.productionPhilosophy: AIOS VR experiences are production-grade Human Consumable realities. No time pressure, no minimum viable product. AIOSEmergentSeedAgent continuously discovers capability gaps and seeds new optimization proposals. AIOSAssetMinerAgent mines real-world data for photorealistic assets. The pipeline aspires to be more — always — and seeds those aspirations back into every experience.
